title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Indira Gandhi National Open University Act, 1985. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 20th September, 1985, vide notification No. S.O. 678(E), dated 19th September, 1985, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
